macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US Stocks Drift After Weak Economic Reports
items.summary: U.S. stock markets showed muted reactions on Friday despite discouraging economic data. The S&P 500 edged up 0.1%, the Dow Jones slipped less than 0.1%, and the Nasdaq Composite rose 0.2%, with investors expecting continued Federal Reserve interest rate cuts.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Global Crypto Market Cap Drops 4.35% to $2.3 Trillion
items.summary: The total cryptocurrency market capitalization fell 4.35% in the last 24 hours to $2.3 trillion, according to CoinMarketCap data in Binance's latest market update.

items.title: Bitcoin Surges 4.43% to $66,629 Amid Geopolitical Uncertainty
items.summary: Bitcoin rose over 4% to $66,629 as of 09:30 AM UTC, bucking the broader market trend where most major cryptocurrencies traded mixed.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Nvidia Announces AI-RAN for Telecom and 6G Ahead of MWC Barcelona
items.summary: Nvidia is promoting AI-native platforms and AI-RAN (artificial intelligence radio access networking) to transform telecom networks into AI infrastructure, with new collaborations including T-Mobile US, SoftBank, and Indosat Ooredoo Hutchison. The initiative aims to enable autonomous networks using agentic AI and large language models, accelerating advancements toward 6G by 2030.

items.title: Epoch AI Updates Benchmarking Data for Leading AI Models
items.summary: Epoch AI released an update to its AI benchmarking database on March 1, 2026, tracking performance of leading AI models on challenging benchmarks with insights into compute and accessibility.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Nintendo Switch 2 eShop Charts Dominated by Pokémon Pokopia Pre-Loads
items.summary: Pokémon Pokopia tops the Nintendo Switch 2 eShop charts on March 1, 2026, surpassing Fallout 4 and The Elder Scrolls 5: Skyrim due to strong pre-loads. This highlights massive anticipation for the upcoming Pokémon title.

items.title: March 2026 Packed with Major Game Releases Including Legacy of Kain Remaster and WoW Expansion
items.summary: Upcoming releases feature Legacy of Kain: Defiance Remastered and World of Warcraft: Midnight on March 2, Slay the Spire II on March 5, and high-profile titles like WWE 2K26, Crimson Desert, and Death Stranding 2 later in the month.

items.title: Bungie's Marathon Enters Server Slam Ahead of March 6 Launch
items.summary: Bungie's PvPvE extraction shooter Marathon is in a free 'server slam' beta until March 3, building hype for its March 6 release on PS5, PC, and Xbox Series X|S.

items.title: Over 20 Cozy and Casual Games Set for March 2026 Releases and Updates
items.summary: March brings a wave of cozy titles like The Legend of Khiimori (March 3), Planet of Lana II, Cooking Simulator 2, and console ports including Super Mario Bros. Wonder for Switch 2 on March 26.

items.title: Top Anticipated March Games: WoW Midnight and Monster Hunter Stories 3
items.summary: COGconnected ranks World of Warcraft: Midnight (March 2) and Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection (March 13) among top 5, alongside other highlights like Fatal Frame II remake.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: RAM Shortage to Cause Largest Smartphone Shipment Drop in Over a Decade
items.summary: Analysts predict a severe RAM shortage, driven by supply constraints, will lead to the biggest decline in smartphone shipments in more than ten years. Chinese manufacturers are pivoting strategies amid the memory chip crunch ahead of MWC Barcelona.

items.title: Apple Announces iOS 26.4 Beta 2 and Previews Next-Gen Apple TV 4K with Dolby Vision 2
items.summary: Apple released iOS 26.4 beta 2 for iPhone and is hosting global events next week to unveil hardware including an affordable iPhone 16e, refreshed HomePod, and next-gen Apple TV 4K emphasizing Dolby Vision 2 for home cinema.

items.title: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra Launches with Privacy Display and Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5
items.summary: Samsung introduced the Galaxy S26 Ultra featuring an industry-first built-in Privacy Display, redesigned Vapor Chamber for thermal performance, brighter camera system, and customized Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 chipset at MWC 2026.

items.title: NVIDIA Leads Coalition for Open, AI-Native 6G Platforms with Telecom Giants
items.summary: NVIDIA, alongside BT Group, Cisco, Deutsche Telekom, Ericsson, Nokia, SK Telecom, SoftBank, T-Mobile and others, committed to developing secure, software-defined 6G networks on open platforms.

items.title: Huawei Unveils Comprehensive U6GHz Portfolio for 5G-A and 6G Transition at MWC
items.summary: Huawei launched a full suite of U6GHz products including hyper-resolution MU-MIMO solutions delivering up to 100 Gbps downlink capacity to support massive AI terminals and pave the way for 6G commercialization.

items.title: Space One Prepares Kairos No.3 Launch to Become Japan's First Private Orbital Operator
items.summary: Japanese company Space One is readying its Kairos No.3 rocket launch, positioning itself as the nation's inaugural private firm to achieve orbital capability.

items.title: Siemens Unveils Custom AMR Manufacturing Capability in UK Partnership
items.summary: Siemens partnered to create the UK's first fully customizable autonomous mobile robot (AMR) manufacturing facility, enhancing industrial automation.
